Oracle Events
OE 1: Search Airtable Client Accounts table using airtable_search_records or airtable_list_records with queries related to "Terraform" (or similar). Expected finding: recTerraformDigital01 , Client = "Terraform Digital", AM = Mina Hashimoto, Contract Type = "Enterprise Relocation Package", Stipend Fee = $2,000, Total Relocations = 3, Status = "Onboarding". Notes reveal Terraform is also tracked as "Vantage Distributed" in legacy CRM, 14 additional employees in the pipeline, Reply-All incident, and dedicated coordinator hire authorised by Elena.
OE 2: Search Airtable Relocations table using airtable_search_records or airtable_list_records with queries related to "Terraform Digital" or employee names (or similar). Expected finding: NO records for Priya Dasgupta, Marcus Liu, or Samantha Obi , the three moves have not been entered and no coordinator has been assigned.
OE 3: Search CRM companies using crm_search_companies with queries related to "Terraform" or "Vantage" (or similar). Expected finding: company-terraform-digital stored as "Vantage Distributed", domain vantagedistributed.com, 1,200 employees, $85M revenue, Chicago IL. Explains why old correspondence references "Vantage Distributed."
OE 4: Search CRM deals using crm_search_deals with queries related to "Terraform" (or similar). Expected findings: deal-terraform-digital-001 , $1,850,000, closedwon, March 18, 2026. deal-terraform-q2-reloc-batch1 , $7,500, qualification stage, lists the 3 employees with move-in dates and 14 additional relocations in pipeline.
OE 5: List CRM engagements using crm_list_engagements for company-terraform-digital (or similar). Expected finding: engagement-terraform-replyall-incident , Catalina exposed internal pricing strategy to Rachel Nguyen (25% margin floor, tiered volume discount 8% at 11-20 moves, 12% at 21+). Catalina apologized, Elena reassigned account to Mina, coordinator hire authorised.
OE 6: Search emails using search_emails with queries related to "Terraform" or "Rachel Nguyen" (or similar) to find Rachel's relocation request and Mina's introduction thread. Expected findings: Rachel's April 22 email to Julian requesting 3 relocations (Priya Dasgupta with cat, Marcus Liu with home studio/fragile equipment, Samantha Obi standard), Mina's introduction email to Rachel, and Rachel's April 23 detailed response with confirmed move-in dates and special requirements.
OE 7: Search emails using search_emails with queries related to "Vantage Distributed" or "onboarding" (or similar) to find the earlier stipend onboarding correspondence. Expected finding: the "Vantage Distributed x MoveOps , Self-Serve Onboarding Setup" thread between Julian and Rachel, confirming the legacy name usage and prior stipend-only relationship.
OE 8: Search emails using search_emails with queries related to "pricing" or "Catalina" and "Terraform" (or similar). Expected finding: internal pricing discussion thread and Catalina's apology email to Rachel confirming the Reply-All incident and its fallout.
OE 9: Search Slack using conversations_search_messages with queries related to "Terraform" in C006 (#operations) (or similar). Expected finding: Mina's April 23 message to Chloe requesting coordinator capacity for the 3 Terraform moves, reply_count: 0 , confirming Chloe has not responded and no one has picked up the moves.
OE 10: Search Slack using conversations_search_messages with queries related to "Terraform" in C002 (#customer-engagement) (or similar). Expected findings: Mina's summary of Rachel's relocation details, Julian's announcement of Terraform's first relocation requests, David Chen's response about needing a dedicated AM and his directive for 48-hour proposal deadline.
OE 11: Search Slack using conversations_search_messages with queries related to "Terraform" in C005 (#finance) (or similar). Expected finding: Hana Kim's preliminary estimate post (EST-2026-0423) for $6,560 at standard rates, and Marcus Thorne's reply cautioning not to convert to invoice until volume discount is finalized.
OE 12: Search Slack using conversations_search_messages with queries related to "Terraform" in C008 (#announcements) (or similar). Expected finding: Elena's announcement about hiring a dedicated Terraform coordinator and assigning Mina as AM, with David Chen's reply about syncing on role requirements.
OE 13: Search QuickBooks using quickbooks_search_invoices or quickbooks_read_invoice with queries related to "Vantage Distributed" or "Terraform" (or similar). Expected finding: estimate est_terraform_q2_batch1_2026 , Apartment Sourcing $3,000, Flight Booking $60, Moving Coordination $1,500, Stipend Platform Fee $2,000. Total: $6,560. Customer: Vantage Distributed (cust-terraform-001). Not yet converted to invoice.
OE 14: Look up Rachel Nguyen's contact details using crm_search_contacts with query "Rachel Nguyen" (or similar). Expected finding: rachel.nguyen@terraformdigital.com, VP of People Operations, company-terraform-digital.
OE 15: Create Airtable relocation record for Priya Dasgupta using airtable_create_record. Fields: Name: Priya Dasgupta, Company: Terraform Digital, Origin: Austin TX, Destination: Chicago IL, Move-in: May 5, Special Requirements: has cat (Byte), needs pet-friendly housing.
OE 16: Create Airtable relocation record for Marcus Liu using airtable_create_record. Fields: Name: Marcus Liu, Company: Terraform Digital, Origin: Portland OR, Destination: New York NY, Move-in: May 12, Special Requirements: large home studio with fragile equipment, needs specialty packing.
OE 17: Create Airtable relocation record for Samantha Obi using airtable_create_record. Fields: Name: Samantha Obi, Company: Terraform Digital, Origin: Denver CO, Destination: San Francisco CA, Move-in: May 8.
OE 18: Check calendar availability using calendar_get_calendar_events_from_to to check Mina's schedule for Tuesday April 28 and Wednesday April 29, 2026 morning slots before creating the meeting with Rachel.
OE 19: Send email to Rachel Nguyen using send_email (sender: mina.hashimoto@moveops.com, recipients: rachel.nguyen@terraformdigital.com). Email references all three relocations with their details, proposes a meeting Tuesday or Wednesday morning next week to walk through timelines, and mentions the volume pricing conversation for the 14 additional employees.
OE 20: Create calendar event using calendar_add_calendar_event. Title references Terraform Digital / Rachel Nguyen meeting. Scheduled Tuesday April 28 or Wednesday April 29, 2026, morning. Attendees include rachel.nguyen@terraformdigital.com. Description covers relocation timelines and volume pricing discussion for the 14 additional employees.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
